execution_header.scope: Apply mirror-safe branch protection to Uniton_Shared_Live main without blocking sync automation.

capability_check.action: Apply mirror-safe branch protection to Uniton_Shared_Live main and write scoped evidence.
capability_check.side_effect_class: Scoped GitHub settings mutation for Uniton_Shared_Live main plus evidence artifact creation in Uniton_Shared.
capability_check.capability_source: NTS task authorization; LAW_GITHUB_01; LAW_N5 REPORT_TEMPLATE_V2; GITHUB_BRANCH_PROTECTION_PLAN_V1.
capability_check.authorization: Explicitly allowed only if mirror sync write path was proven safe.

repo_boundary_check.notes: Only Uniton_Shared_Live branch protection settings were changed. Evidence artifacts were written only in Uniton_Shared.

mirror_safety_gate.sync_writer_mechanism: actions/checkout target checkout uses secrets.LIVE_SYNC_TOKEN, then git push from target checkout
mirror_safety_gate.token_type_evidence: Secret name LIVE_SYNC_TOKEN; token value redacted by GitHub Actions logs
mirror_safety_gate.latest_push_log_evidence: Run 25123225369 pushed 943c7ce..c4e45e9 main -> main using Uniton_Shared_Live checkout credentials
mirror_safety_gate.sync_path_safe_reason: Protection does not require PRs, status checks, deployments, or push restrictions. Normal fast-forward git push remains allowed; force pushes and deletions are blocked.
mirror_safety_gate.optional_sync_test: Not triggered. SYNC_INFO was read only; source runtime files were not modified just to force a sync.

unitonzengarden/Uniton_Shared.note: Previously applied governance source protection; not modified by this task.

unitonzengarden/uzgplus-app.note: Pre-existing product protection; not modified by this task.

risks_warnings: Branch protection intentionally does not require PRs on Uniton_Shared_Live because the mirror sync workflow writes directly to main.
Admin enforcement remains disabled to preserve NTS/admin emergency access.
The LIVE_SYNC_TOKEN value and exact backing account are redacted by GitHub; safety is based on workflow configuration, recent successful push evidence, and a non-blocking protection profile.
Post-protection sync was not triggered because forcing source runtime changes solely for a sync test was out of scope.

sync.worktree_clean: NO - evidence artifacts pending commit; final clean sync verified after push
